title: dryopteris pteroides var. terminans
intro: Dryopteris pteroides var. terminans, also known as the Mountain Shield Fern, is a plant species belonging to the Dryopteris genus, which is a type of fern found in tropical and subtropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
